title: みんなでビッグチャレンジ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and I are on the way back from an
outing when Taiki Shuttle suddenly calls out to us
from the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well howdy, Akebono! Nice timin', pardner!
Would you mind givin' me a hand real quick here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The shoppin' district's holdin' an event right now,
and we're makin' an ultra-big pizza so the whole
gang can go ahead and have 'emselves a pizza
party!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that sounds fun! Is that giant ball of dough
for the crust, then?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! In fact, we're just about to roll 'er out
right now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Cept I only know how to do American-style pizzas with those big ol' thick crusts, and a pie like that'll end up half-raw even after we fire it in the pizza oven...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're using a pizza oven? I know how to
make Italian-style pizzas with really thin crusts!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, tickle my spurs! So how's about lending
yours truly a little help?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Can I, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay! Okay, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! This sounds like a great opportunity to
make a Neapolitan pizza! Step back, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here we gooo!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! She sent the pizza flying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono tosses the flat dough into the air,
letting the centrifugal force stretch it out. A few
adjustments later, the crust is ready!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now that the crust's covered with sauce, it's time
to add the toppings!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: The pizza's so big I can't reach the middle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We managed to spread the sauce across all the
dough using a long, extended brush, but we can't
do the same for the toppings.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, looks like it's my time to shine! I'm
gonna show y'all a secret cowgirl technique!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey! Yeehaw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle expertly loops a rope around the
bucket of toppings, then works the rope to
evenly scatter the ingredients all over the base.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, check out those lasso skills! You're
incredible, Taiki!
choice_data_list: Nobody else could've pulled that off...
Nobody else could've pulled that off...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We should let the children add some toppings
too!
choice_data_list:
Maybe they could throw them from somewhere
high up.

They could do it like ninjas to add some
Japanese flair.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they should be able to reach if I let them ride
on my shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yay, it's working! If I throw the ingredients, they
land in the middle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're doing great! I wonder if you can fill in that
gap over there, too?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Hey miss, go over there, please! There's another
empty space!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty! Next up's the cheese! Saddle up, y'all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the enormous pizza is done!
Everyone takes a slice and we all dig in.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is good! This is the best pizza I've ever had in my whole life!

text_block_list.name: Girl's Father
text_block_list.text:
It's better than the stuff they serve in restaurants!
It looks great, too, and it was cooked to
perfection.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Have some more, Daddy! Seconds, please!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Eat on up now! Hey, why don'tcha get some more
of the posse to mosey on over?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! I'm gonna get my friends to
try the pizza I made!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn tootin'! And this here round-up woulda only
been half the shindig without you, Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No way! We all made this happen together. I
really don't think I could've made such a delicious
pizza on my own.
choice_data_list:
I guess the secret ingredient was the love
everyone put into it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that makes sense! No wonder it tastes so
yummy! How absolutely buono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yippee ki-yay! We even got Akebono's stamp of
approval!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's so fun to cook with everyone! Thanks for
inviting me along, Taiki! We should definitely do
this again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yeah, they can pretend they're flinging
throwing stars!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mon folks, let's all be ninjas and toss our
toppin' stars right on there!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Th-this is too hard! I can't throw them far enough!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
The salami slices fly really smoothly, but the
veggies don't get any air at all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. Okay, how about we pretend to be
sumo wrestlers throwing salt instead?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I don't even watch sumo! What are you talking
about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some trial and error, the huge pizza finally
ends up topped and finished! Everyone takes a
slice and we all dig in.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. The spot I did has a whole heap of salami
on it!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Look at my bit! I stacked the salami to look like
flowers! Cooking is so fun!
choice_data_list: All's well that ends well, huh?
All's well that ends well, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It might not be the prettiest pizza ever, but
I like how you can tell who decorated which part.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I'm so glad the children learned to like
cooking too!
choice_data_list: Hm? That slice on your plate...
Hm? That slice on your plate...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oop, you noticed? Yeah, this slice is from your
part of the pizza.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not giving it to you, however nicely you
ask! I asked Taiki for this slice, and I got it fair
and square!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Time to see how it tastes! Down the hatch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! It's buono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Hishi Akebono happily eat her pizza, I
feel like I gained a better understanding of why
she likes cooking for others so much.
